title.en: After that, Ye Tian began to specialize in the ...

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough, and the Mixed Yuan Dao was the first to be promoted to the Consummation Realm, becoming Ye Tian's first Consummation Realm's Eternal Dao.

At least in the Eternal Path, Ye Tian began to narrow the gap with other top realm Legendary Lords.

Many eternal years have passed, and Ye Tian's eternal path of eternal life has also broken through to the realm of perfection.

After that, Ye Tian began to specialize in the Gray Mist Eternal Dao.

His goal was to cultivate the Gray Mist Eternal Dao to the Dacheng realm within the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and in that case, his strength would also be improved.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of eternal years have passed.

At this time, after Ye Tian entered the long river of time countless times, with the help of the long river of time, his mastery of time had reached a very high and profound realm, and he could even resist the power of the long river of time for a few seconds, and he could ensure that he would not be regressed by time within a few seconds.

That's a great step forward.

"Breaking through, the Gray Mist Eternal Dao has reached the realm of Dacheng. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

The Gray Mist Eternal Dao of the Dacheng Realm is many times more powerful than the ordinary Eternal Dao of the Consummation Realm, and it is almost comparable to the ordinary Legendary Eternal Dao.

However, if you want to elevate the Gray Mist Eternal Path to the Perfection Realm, it will be too difficult.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't expect that he would be able to cultivate the Gray Mist Eternal Dao to the consummation realm within the Gray Mist Stone Statue at 120.

Subsequently, Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend, and he could get as many benefits as he could, and he didn't care too much about more gains.

And just like that, the years passed.

At this time, there are fewer and fewer legendary lords left inside the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

Some legendary lords fell one level after another, and some left on their own initiative, unwilling to try, and the treasures they obtained were lost.

However, the half-step Legendary Realm lords did not leave, they still entered the long river of time again and again, this is a great opportunity for them, not for rewards, just to be able to control some more time.

After the birth of the Gray Mist Stone Statue in the Source Sea, there is a limit to the time it can exist, and now it is getting closer and closer to this period.

......

Outside the Grey Mist Stone Statue.

Lord Longgu opened his eyes and sensed the shock of the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

"In tens of thousands of eternal years, the gray mist stone statue will be gone, I wonder if I can trace its traces this time?"

Lord Longgu muttered.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of eternal years have passed.

On this day, a legendary lord was ?? kicked out the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and Ye Tian was forced to move out of the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

The moment he moved out, Ye Tian annihilated his copy body, leaving only one copy body.

Whoa!!

A legendary lord of the True Void Sacred Land appeared in the void of the Source Sea.

And he was here, looking at the gray mist stone statue.

Suddenly.

The Gray Mist Stone Statue moved, and the space-time around it began to become unstable.

Bang!!!

The river of time appeared, and the stone statue of gray fog escaped into the river of time.

"It turns out that the departure of the gray mist stone statue is through the long river of time, I thought it was tearing the space and leaving!

Ye Tian said darkly.

Escape through the long river of time in the Void Zone, and there is no way to track even a half-step Legendary Realm.

And the Lord of the Legendary Realm, in the long river of time, can't catch up with the Gray Mist Stone Statue at all.

Whoa!!

A Legendary Realm Lord appeared and entered the river of time alone, tracking down the Grey Mist Stone Statue.

Then soon, these Legendary Realm Lords came back one by one, their faces showing loss, and it was obvious that they had not been able to catch up with the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

"It's a pity!"

Lord Longgu lamented.

If you can catch up with the Gray Mist Stone Statue, you can catch up with the Gray Mist Stone Statue again and again in the future, which is equivalent to completely occupying the Gray Mist Stone Statue, but this attempt still failed, the Gray Mist Stone Statue is too fast in the long river of time, and any tracking method will be erased by the long river of time.

Therefore, he couldn't catch up, and so did the other Legendary Realm Lords.

These Legendary Realm Lords did not stay in the Source Sea, and turned around and left the Source Sea.

And those legendary lords of the True Immortal Land also followed the Dragon Ancient Lord back to the Infinite Sea True Immortal Land, after all, the gray stone statue has already escaped, and there is no point in continuing to stay here.

When these Legendary Lords and Legendary Realm Lords had left, the Holy Peak Lords and Ice Han Lords of the Source Sea Space-Time Territory would dare to speak.

"Thank you, Lord Endless, this time!

Lord Ice Han spoke.

"How did you get it?" Ye Tian asked

Lord Binghan said: "No matter what, I can't pass through the Gray Mist Bridge, although I haven't obtained any treasures, but in the Gray Mist Bridge, I have gradually comprehended the mystery of the will and the innate eternal rules, if I go back to retreat for a while, it should not be a problem to break through to the Origin Realm Legendary Lord." "

For Lord Ice Letter, becoming the Legendary Lord of the Initial Realm was already her greatest desire.

"I have also gained something, and my strength has improved a lot!"

The Holy Peak Lord said.

Immediately, Lord Ice Han and Lord of the Holy Peak took their leave and went back to retreat.

And Ye Tian also returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm, and he was going to study the reward he had obtained from the Gray Mist Stone Statue - the blood tissue of the Xeon Legend Creature.

Among the gray mist stone statues, he did not dare to study them.

But now that it's out, you can study it with confidence.

Ye Tian mainly comprehended the body structure and mysteries of the Supreme Legendary Body, even if it was just some blood tissue, it also contained a kind of Legendary Eternal Dao of that Supreme Legendary Realm creature.

Therefore, the value of such a piece of blood tissue is unimaginable.

I don't know how the Eternal Master did it, if it weren't for this bottle, it stands to reason that such a Legendary Realm Lord creature would definitely be able to heal and recover to its peak state with this blood tissue, and it would be impossible for it to fall and die.

"Such a blood organization, the Lord of the Legendary Realm knows about it, I'm afraid it will come to snatch it from me. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he will not reveal this treasure.

This will be of great help to him in condensing the Supreme Legendary Body in the future, and this blood tissue can also help him comprehend various eternal paths.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually immersed himself in this blood tissue, every drop of its blood was an infinite world, containing endless rules and eternal paths.

After contemplating it for a long time, Ye Tian found that the owner of this blood tissue was afraid that he had completely controlled space and time

If you completely control time or space, you can become a Legendary Realm Lord, and if you completely control them, then you have reached the peak realm among the Legendary Realm Lords, and the next step is to completely control the fusion of time and space, override the timeline and the spatial dimension, and become the eternal controller above time and space.

"Although this piece of blood tissue is very small, it has helped me too much, and I hope that with the help of it, I can cultivate the Gray Mist Eternal Dao to the consummation realm. "

Ye Tianming enlightened. _
